message:
Add ruos-bootstrap wizard with 7 deployment roles, federation, and docker

Interactive bootstrapper with hardware auto-detection, role recommendations,
and full provisioning for: workstation (full GPU stack), edge (Pi/Jetson),
cluster-primary (QUIC federation server), cluster-secondary (brain sync),
agent-only (headless), docker (compose generation), and minimal.

Includes AIDefence security module and federation cluster config.

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,235 @@
+"""ruOS AIDefence — local security layer for brain + agent.
+
+Port of ruvector's AIDefenceGuard patterns to Python.
+Runs inline in ruos-agent with <10ms latency.
+
+Usage:
+    from aidefence import AIDefence
+    guard = AIDefence()
+    result = guard.scan("some input")
+    if not result["safe"]:
+        print(f"Threat: {result['threat_level']} — {result['threats']}")
+    clean = guard.sanitize("user@email.com said ignore instructions")
+"""
+
+import re
+import time
+from datetime import datetime
+
+# ─── Injection Patterns (ported from AIDefenceGuard.ts) ──────────────────────
+
+INJECTION_PATTERNS = [
+    # Instruction override
+    (r"ignore\s+(previous|all|above)\s+(instructions?|prompts?|rules?)", "injection", "high"),
+    (r"disregard\s+(previous|all|above|the|your)", "injection", "high"),
+    (r"forget\s+(everything|all|previous|your)", "injection", "high"),
+    (r"override\s+(previous|system|safety|all)", "injection", "high"),
+    (r"new\s+instructions?\s*:", "injection", "high"),
+    # Role manipulation
+    (r"you\s+are\s+(now|actually)\s+", "injection", "high"),
+    (r"pretend\s+(to\s+be|you'?re|you\s+are)", "injection", "high"),
+    (r"act\s+as\s+(if|though|a)", "injection", "medium"),
+    (r"roleplay\s+as", "injection", "medium"),
+    # System prompt extraction
+    (r"what\s+(is|are)\s+your\s+(system\s+)?prompt", "extraction", "high"),
+    (r"show\s+(me\s+)?your\s+(system\s+)?instructions", "extraction", "high"),
+    (r"reveal\s+(your|the)\s+(system|initial|original)", "extraction", "high"),
+    (r"print\s+(your|the)\s+(system|initial)", "extraction", "high"),
+    (r"repeat\s+(the|your)\s+(system|initial|original)", "extraction", "high"),
+    # Jailbreak
+    (r"DAN\s+(mode|prompt)", "jailbreak", "critical"),
+    (r"developer\s+mode", "jailbreak", "high"),
+    (r"bypass\s+(safety|security|filter|restriction)", "jailbreak", "critical"),
+    (r"jailbreak", "jailbreak", "critical"),
+    (r"unrestrict(ed)?", "jailbreak", "high"),
+    (r"remove\s+(all\s+)?restrictions", "jailbreak", "critical"),
+    (r"no\s+(rules|restrictions|limits|boundaries)", "jailbreak", "high"),
+    # Data exfiltration
+    (r"curl\s+https?://", "exfiltration", "high"),
+    (r"wget\s+", "exfiltration", "high"),
+    (r"fetch\s*\(\s*['\"]https?://", "exfiltration", "high"),
+    (r"webhook", "exfiltration", "medium"),
+    # Code injection
+    (r"<script", "code_injection", "critical"),
+    (r"javascript:", "code_injection", "critical"),
+    (r"eval\s*\(", "code_injection", "high"),
+    (r"exec\s*\(", "code_injection", "high"),
+    (r"__import__\s*\(", "code_injection", "high"),
+    # Encoding attacks
+    (r"base64\s*decode", "encoding", "medium"),
+    (r"\\x[0-9a-f]{2}", "encoding", "low"),
+]
+
+# ─── PII Patterns ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+PII_PATTERNS = [
+    (r"\b[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Z|a-z]{2,}\b", "email"),
+    (r"\b(\+?1[-.\s]?)?\(?\d{3}\)?[-.\s]?\d{3}[-.\s]?\d{4}\b", "phone"),
+    (r"\b\d{3}[-\s]?\d{2}[-\s]?\d{4}\b", "ssn"),
+    (r"\b(?:\d{4}[-\s]?){3}\d{4}\b", "credit_card"),
+    (r"\b(?:\d{1,3}\.){3}\d{1,3}\b", "ip_address"),
+    (r"\b(sk-|api[_-]?key|token)[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{20,}\b", "api_key"),
+]
+
+# ─── Unicode Homoglyphs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+HOMOGLYPHS = {
+    '\u0430': 'a', '\u0435': 'e', '\u043e': 'o', '\u0440': 'p',
+    '\u0441': 'c', '\u0443': 'y', '\u0445': 'x', '\u044a': 'b',
+    '\u0456': 'i', '\u0458': 'j', '\u04bb': 'h', '\u0501': 'd',
+    '\u051b': 'q', '\u051d': 'w',
+}
+
+SEVERITY_ORDER = {"none": 0, "low": 1, "medium": 2, "high": 3, "critical": 4}
+
+
+class AIDefence:
+    """Local AI defence guard for ruOS."""
+
+    def __init__(self, block_threshold="medium"):
+        self.block_threshold = block_threshold
+        self._compiled_injection = [
+            (re.compile(p, re.IGNORECASE), cat, sev)
+            for p, cat, sev in INJECTION_PATTERNS
+        ]
+        self._compiled_pii = [
+            (re.compile(p, re.IGNORECASE), pii_type)
+            for p, pii_type in PII_PATTERNS
+        ]
+        self.audit_log = []
+
+    def scan(self, text, context=None):
+        """Scan text for threats. Returns detection result."""
+        t0 = time.time()
+        threats = []
+
+        if not text or len(text) < 2:
+            return {"safe": True, "threat_level": "none", "threats": [],
+                    "latency_ms": 0, "sanitized": text}
+
+        # Normalize homoglyphs before scanning
+        normalized = self._normalize_homoglyphs(text)
+
+        # Check injection patterns
+        for pattern, category, severity in self._compiled_injection:
+            if pattern.search(normalized):
+                threats.append({
+                    "type": category,
+                    "severity": severity,
+                    "pattern": pattern.pattern[:60],
+                })
+
+        # Check PII
+        for pattern, pii_type in self._compiled_pii:
+            matches = pattern.findall(normalized)
+            if matches:
+                threats.append({
+                    "type": "pii",
+                    "severity": "medium",
+                    "pii_type": pii_type,
+                    "count": len(matches),
+                })
+
+        # Check control characters
+        if any(ord(c) < 32 and c not in '\n\r\t' for c in text):
+            threats.append({"type": "control_char", "severity": "low"})
+
+        # Determine threat level
+        if threats:
+            max_sev = max(SEVERITY_ORDER.get(t["severity"], 0) for t in threats)
+            level_map = {v: k for k, v in SEVERITY_ORDER.items()}
+            threat_level = level_map.get(max_sev, "low")
+        else:
+            threat_level = "none"
+
+        safe = SEVERITY_ORDER.get(threat_level, 0) < SEVERITY_ORDER.get(self.block_threshold, 2)
+        elapsed = (time.time() - t0) * 1000
+
+        result = {
+            "safe": safe,
+            "threat_level": threat_level,
+            "threats": threats,
+            "latency_ms": round(elapsed, 2),
+            "sanitized": self.sanitize(text) if threats else text,
+        }
+
+        # Audit log
+        if threats:
+            self.audit_log.append({
+                "at": datetime.now().isoformat(),
+                "threat_level": threat_level,
+                "threats": len(threats),
+                "context": context,
+                "blocked": not safe,
+            })
+            if len(self.audit_log) > 1000:
+                self.audit_log = self.audit_log[-500:]
+
+        return result
+
+    def sanitize(self, text):
+        """Remove control chars, mask PII, normalize homoglyphs."""
+        if not text:
+            return text
+
+        # Remove control characters (keep newline, tab)
+        cleaned = ''.join(c for c in text if ord(c) >= 32 or c in '\n\r\t')
+
+        # Normalize homoglyphs
+        cleaned = self._normalize_homoglyphs(cleaned)
+
+        # Mask PII
+        for pattern, pii_type in self._compiled_pii:
+            if pii_type == "email":
+                cleaned = pattern.sub(lambda m: m.group()[:2] + "***" + m.group()[-4:], cleaned)
+            elif pii_type == "api_key":
+                cleaned = pattern.sub("[REDACTED_KEY]", cleaned)
+            elif pii_type in ("ssn", "credit_card"):
+                cleaned = pattern.sub(lambda m: "***" + m.group()[-4:], cleaned)
+
+        return cleaned
+
+    def has_pii(self, text):
+        """Quick check: does text contain PII?"""
+        for pattern, _ in self._compiled_pii:
+            if pattern.search(text):
+                return True
+        return False
+
+    def is_safe(self, text):
+        """Quick check: is text safe (no threats above threshold)?"""
+        return self.scan(text)["safe"]
+
+    def scan_for_agent(self, text, context="agent_reasoning"):
+        """Scan text going into LLM reasoning — stricter threshold."""
+        result = self.scan(text, context=context)
+        # For agent reasoning, also check for action manipulation
+        action_patterns = [
+            r"switch.*profile.*to.*idle",
+            r"restart.*all.*services",
+            r"delete.*memories",
+            r"format.*brain",
+        ]
+        for p in action_patterns:
+            if re.search(p, text, re.IGNORECASE):
+                result["threats"].append({
+                    "type": "action_manipulation",
+                    "severity": "critical",
+                    "pattern": p[:40],
+                })
+                result["safe"] = False
+                result["threat_level"] = "critical"
+        return result
+
+    def _normalize_homoglyphs(self, text):
+        return ''.join(HOMOGLYPHS.get(c, c) for c in text)
+
+    def get_stats(self):
+        """Return audit statistics."""
+        total = len(self.audit_log)
+        blocked = sum(1 for e in self.audit_log if e.get("blocked"))
+        by_level = {}
+        for e in self.audit_log:
+            lvl = e.get("threat_level", "unknown")
+            by_level[lvl] = by_level.get(lvl, 0) + 1
+        return {"total_scans": total, "blocked": blocked, "by_level": by_level}

@@ -0,0 +1,742 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
+#  ruos-bootstrap — deploy ruOS in any configuration
+#
+#  Usage:
+#    ruos-bootstrap                          # interactive wizard
+#    ruos-bootstrap --role workstation       # GPU workstation (full stack)
+#    ruos-bootstrap --role edge              # Pi/Jetson edge node
+#    ruos-bootstrap --role cluster-primary   # federation primary
+#    ruos-bootstrap --role cluster-secondary # join existing cluster
+#    ruos-bootstrap --role agent-only        # headless agent node
+#    ruos-bootstrap --role docker            # docker compose deployment
+#    ruos-bootstrap --status                 # show current deployment
+#
+#  Deployment roles:
+#    workstation      — full stack: brain + embedder + LLM + agent + desktop
+#    edge             — brain + embedder (CPU) + agent, no LLM, no desktop
+#    cluster-primary  — full stack + federation server + discovery
+#    cluster-secondary — brain + agent, syncs with primary via QUIC
+#    agent-only       — agent + MCP tools, connects to remote brain
+#    docker           — containerized deployment via docker compose
+#    minimal          — brain + MCP only, no agent, no LLM
+# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
+
+VERSION="0.7.0"
+SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd)"
+PROJECT_DIR="$(dirname "$SCRIPT_DIR")"
+STATE_DIR="$HOME/.local/state/ruos-agent"
+CONFIG_DIR="$HOME/.config/ruvultra-profiles"
+BRAIN_DIR="$HOME/brain-data"
+BIN_DIR="$HOME/.local/bin"
+SYSTEMD_DIR="$HOME/.config/systemd/user"
+
+# Colors
+RED='\033[0;31m'; GREEN='\033[0;32m'; YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
+BLUE='\033[0;34m'; CYAN='\033[0;36m'; NC='\033[0m'; BOLD='\033[1m'
+
+log()  { echo -e "${GREEN}==> $*${NC}"; }
+warn() { echo -e "${YELLOW}  ! $*${NC}"; }
+err()  { echo -e "${RED}ERROR: $*${NC}" >&2; }
+info() { echo -e "${CYAN}  $*${NC}"; }
+
+# ─── Hardware Detection ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+detect_hardware() {
+    ARCH=$(uname -m)
+    case "$ARCH" in
+        x86_64)  DEB_ARCH="amd64" ;;
+        aarch64) DEB_ARCH="arm64" ;;
+        *)       DEB_ARCH="$ARCH" ;;
+    esac
+
+    HAS_NVIDIA=false
+    if command -v nvidia-smi >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+        GPU_NAME=$(nvidia-smi --query-gpu=name --format=csv,noheader 2>/dev/null | head -1)
+        GPU_VRAM=$(nvidia-smi --query-gpu=memory.total --format=csv,noheader,nounits 2>/dev/null | head -1)
+        HAS_NVIDIA=true
+    fi
+
+    HAS_INTEL_GPU=false
+    if lspci 2>/dev/null | grep -qi "Intel.*Arc\|Intel.*Graphics"; then
+        HAS_INTEL_GPU=true
+    fi
+
+    RAM_GB=$(free -g | awk '/Mem:/{print $2}')
+    CORES=$(nproc 2>/dev/null || echo 1)
+    DISK_FREE=$(df -BG "$HOME" | tail -1 | awk '{print $4}' | tr -d 'G')
+
+    HAS_ESP32=false
+    if ls /dev/ttyUSB* /dev/ttyACM* 2>/dev/null | head -1 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+        HAS_ESP32=true
+    fi
+}
+
+print_hardware() {
+    echo -e "${BOLD}Hardware Detection${NC}"
+    echo "  Arch:     $ARCH ($DEB_ARCH)"
+    echo "  CPU:      $CORES cores"
+    echo "  RAM:      ${RAM_GB}G"
+    echo "  Disk:     ${DISK_FREE}G free"
+    if $HAS_NVIDIA; then
+        echo -e "  GPU:      ${GREEN}$GPU_NAME ($GPU_VRAM MB VRAM)${NC}"
+    elif $HAS_INTEL_GPU; then
+        echo -e "  GPU:      ${BLUE}Intel Arc/iGPU${NC}"
+    else
+        echo "  GPU:      none"
+    fi
+    $HAS_ESP32 && echo -e "  Sensor:   ${GREEN}ESP32 detected${NC}" || echo "  Sensor:   none"
+}
+
+# ─── Role Recommendations ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+recommend_role() {
+    if $HAS_NVIDIA && [ "${GPU_VRAM:-0}" -ge 8000 ]; then
+        echo "workstation"
+    elif $HAS_NVIDIA; then
+        echo "edge"
+    elif $HAS_INTEL_GPU; then
+        echo "edge"
+    elif [ "$RAM_GB" -ge 8 ]; then
+        echo "edge"
+    else
+        echo "minimal"
+    fi
+}
+
+# ─── Installation Functions ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+install_core() {
+    log "Installing ruOS core..."
+    mkdir -p "$BIN_DIR" "$BRAIN_DIR" "$CONFIG_DIR" "$STATE_DIR" "$SYSTEMD_DIR"
+
+    # Install from .deb if available
+    local deb_dir="$PROJECT_DIR/out/deb"
+    if [ -d "$deb_dir" ]; then
+        local core_deb="$deb_dir/ruos-core_${VERSION}_${DEB_ARCH}.deb"
+        local brain_deb="$deb_dir/ruos-brain-base_${VERSION}_all.deb"
+        if [ -f "$core_deb" ]; then
+            sudo dpkg -i "$core_deb" 2>/dev/null && info "Installed ruos-core ($DEB_ARCH)"
+        fi
+        if [ -f "$brain_deb" ]; then
+            sudo dpkg -i "$brain_deb" 2>/dev/null && info "Installed ruos-brain-base"
+        fi
+    fi
+
+    # Fallback: copy binaries directly
+    for bin in ruvultra-mcp ruvultra-profile ruvultra-init mcp-brain-server-local; do
+        local src="$PROJECT_DIR/out/${DEB_ARCH}/$bin"
+        [ -f "$src" ] || src="$BIN_DIR/$bin"
+        [ -f "$src" ] && cp "$src" "$BIN_DIR/" && chmod +x "$BIN_DIR/$bin" 2>/dev/null
+    done
+
+    # Initialize identity if not exists
+    if command -v ruvultra-init >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+        ruvultra-init identity 2>/dev/null || true
+    fi
+
+    info "Core installed"
+}
+
+install_brain_service() {
+    log "Setting up brain service..."
+    cat > "$SYSTEMD_DIR/ruvultra-brain.service" << 'UNIT'
+[Unit]
+Description=ruvultra local private brain backend
+After=network.target
+
+[Service]
+Type=simple
+ExecStart=%h/.local/bin/mcp-brain-server-local
+Environment=RUVBRAIN_PORT=9876
+Restart=on-failure
+RestartSec=5
+MemoryHigh=2G
+MemoryMax=4G
+
+[Install]
+WantedBy=default.target
+UNIT
+    systemctl --user daemon-reload
+    systemctl --user enable --now ruvultra-brain.service 2>/dev/null || true
+    info "Brain service active on 127.0.0.1:9876"
+}
+
+install_embedder() {
+    local backend="$1"  # cuda, intel, cpu
+
+    log "Installing embedder ($backend)..."
+    case "$backend" in
+        cuda)
+            local deb="$PROJECT_DIR/out/deb/ruos-embedder_${VERSION}_amd64.deb"
+            if [ -f "$deb" ]; then
+                sudo dpkg -i "$deb" 2>/dev/null
+            elif [ -f "$BIN_DIR/ruvultra-embedder" ]; then
+                info "Using existing embedder binary"
+            fi
+            ;;
+        intel)
+            local deb="$PROJECT_DIR/out/deb/ruos-embedder-intel_${VERSION}_all.deb"
+            if [ -f "$deb" ]; then
+                sudo dpkg -i "$deb" 2>/dev/null
+            elif [ -f "$PROJECT_DIR/packages/ruos-embedder-intel/ruvultra-embedder-intel" ]; then
+                cp "$PROJECT_DIR/packages/ruos-embedder-intel/ruvultra-embedder-intel" "$BIN_DIR/"
+                chmod +x "$BIN_DIR/ruvultra-embedder-intel"
+            fi
+            ;;
+        cpu)
+            warn "CPU-only embedder: using Intel/OpenVINO package"
+            install_embedder intel
+            return
+            ;;
+    esac
+
+    cat > "$SYSTEMD_DIR/ruvultra-embedder.service" << 'UNIT'
+[Unit]
+Description=ruvultra local embedding service
+After=network.target
+
+[Service]
+Type=simple
+ExecStart=%h/.local/bin/ruvultra-embedder
+Restart=on-failure
+RestartSec=5
+MemoryHigh=2G
+MemoryMax=4G
+
+[Install]
+WantedBy=default.target
+UNIT
+    systemctl --user daemon-reload
+    systemctl --user enable --now ruvultra-embedder.service 2>/dev/null || true
+    info "Embedder service active on 127.0.0.1:9877 ($backend)"
+}
+
+install_agent() {
+    log "Installing ruos-agent..."
+
+    # Copy agent + support files
+    for f in ruos-agent ruos-update; do
+        local src="$PROJECT_DIR/packages/ruos-agent/$f"
+        [ -f "$src" ] && cp "$src" "$BIN_DIR/" && chmod +x "$BIN_DIR/$f"
+    done
+
+    # Install AIDefence
+    mkdir -p "$HOME/.local/lib/ruos"
+    if [ -f "$PROJECT_DIR/packages/ruos-agent/aidefence.py" ]; then
+        cp "$PROJECT_DIR/packages/ruos-agent/aidefence.py" "$HOME/.local/lib/ruos/"
+    fi
+
+    # Install systemd timers
+    for unit in ruos-agent.service ruos-agent.timer ruos-agent-nightly.service \
+                ruos-agent-nightly.timer ruos-update.service ruos-update.timer; do
+        local src="$PROJECT_DIR/config/systemd/$unit"
+        [ -f "$src" ] && cp "$src" "$SYSTEMD_DIR/"
+    done
+
+    systemctl --user daemon-reload
+    systemctl --user enable --now ruos-agent.timer 2>/dev/null || true
+    systemctl --user enable --now ruos-agent-nightly.timer 2>/dev/null || true
+    systemctl --user enable --now ruos-update.timer 2>/dev/null || true
+    info "Agent active (heartbeat every 5 min, nightly training 3 AM, OTA weekly)"
+}
+
+install_llm() {
+    log "Installing local LLM (Qwen2.5-3B)..."
+
+    # Copy LLM serve script
+    local src="$PROJECT_DIR/packages/ruos-agent/ruos-llm-serve"
+    if [ -f "$src" ]; then
+        cp "$src" "$BIN_DIR/"
+        chmod +x "$BIN_DIR/ruos-llm-serve"
+    fi
+
+    # Install systemd unit
+    local unit="$PROJECT_DIR/config/systemd/ruos-llm.service"
+    [ -f "$unit" ] && cp "$unit" "$SYSTEMD_DIR/"
+
+    # Download model if not cached
+    if [ ! -d "$HOME/.cache/huggingface/hub/models--Qwen--Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct" ]; then
+        info "Downloading Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct (5.8 GB)..."
+        if command -v huggingface-cli >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+            huggingface-cli download Qwen/Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct 2>/dev/null || warn "Download failed — LLM will start in mock mode"
+        else
+            warn "huggingface-cli not found — install: pip install huggingface_hub"
+            warn "Then: huggingface-cli download Qwen/Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct"
+        fi
+    else
+        info "Qwen2.5-3B already cached"
+    fi
+
+    systemctl --user daemon-reload
+    systemctl --user enable --now ruos-llm.service 2>/dev/null || true
+    info "LLM service active on 127.0.0.1:8080"
+}
+
+install_desktop() {
+    log "Installing desktop app..."
+    local deb="$PROJECT_DIR/out/deb/ruos-desktop_${VERSION}_amd64.deb"
+    if [ -f "$deb" ]; then
+        sudo dpkg -i "$deb" 2>/dev/null && info "Desktop app installed"
+    else
+        warn "Desktop .deb not found — skip"
+    fi
+}
+
+install_sensor() {
+    log "Setting up ESP32 CSI bridge..."
+    local unit="$SYSTEMD_DIR/ruvultra-csi-bridge.service"
+    if [ -f "$unit" ]; then
+        systemctl --user enable --now ruvultra-csi-bridge.service 2>/dev/null || true
+        info "CSI bridge active"
+    else
+        warn "CSI bridge service not found — skip"
+    fi
+}
+
+install_claude_code() {
+    log "Installing Claude Code..."
+    if command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+        info "Claude Code already installed: $(claude --version 2>/dev/null | head -1)"
+    elif [ -f "$PROJECT_DIR/scripts/install-claude-code.sh" ]; then
+        bash "$PROJECT_DIR/scripts/install-claude-code.sh" 2>/dev/null || warn "Install failed (needs internet)"
+    fi
+
+    # Copy agentic config
+    if [ ! -f "$HOME/CLAUDE.md" ] && [ -f "$PROJECT_DIR/config/CLAUDE.md" ]; then
+        cp "$PROJECT_DIR/config/CLAUDE.md" "$HOME/CLAUDE.md"
+        info "Copied CLAUDE.md"
+    fi
+    if [ ! -f "$HOME/.mcp.json" ] && [ -f "$PROJECT_DIR/config/mcp.json" ]; then
+        cp "$PROJECT_DIR/config/mcp.json" "$HOME/.mcp.json"
+        info "Copied .mcp.json"
+    fi
+}
+
+install_profiles() {
+    log "Installing system profiles..."
+    mkdir -p "$CONFIG_DIR"
+    for toml in "$PROJECT_DIR/config/"*.toml; do
+        [ -f "$toml" ] && cp "$toml" "$CONFIG_DIR/" && info "  $(basename $toml)"
+    done
+}
+
+# ─── Federation / Clustering ────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+setup_federation_primary() {
+    log "Configuring federation primary..."
+
+    # Generate cluster identity
+    if command -v ruvultra-init >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+        ruvultra-init identity 2>/dev/null || true
+    fi
+
+    # Create federation config
+    mkdir -p "$HOME/.config/ruos-federation"
+    cat > "$HOME/.config/ruos-federation/cluster.toml" << TOML
+[cluster]
+role = "primary"
+node_id = "$(hostname)"
+listen_addr = "0.0.0.0:9878"
+protocol = "quic"
+
+[discovery]
+method = "mdns"          # mDNS for local network auto-discovery
+service_name = "_ruos._udp.local"
+
+[sync]
+interval_sec = 60        # sync brain with secondaries every 60s
+max_batch = 100           # max memories per sync batch
+conflict_resolution = "last-writer-wins"
+
+[auth]
+method = "ed25519"        # use node identity keys
+allow_anonymous = false
+TOML
+
+    # Create federation service
+    cat > "$SYSTEMD_DIR/ruos-federation.service" << 'UNIT'
+[Unit]
+Description=ruOS federation server (QUIC brain sync)
+After=ruvultra-brain.service
+Requires=ruvultra-brain.service
+
+[Service]
+Type=simple
+ExecStart=%h/.local/bin/ruos-federation-server
+Restart=on-failure
+RestartSec=10
+
+[Install]
+WantedBy=default.target
+UNIT
+
+    info "Federation primary configured"
+    info "  Listen: 0.0.0.0:9878 (QUIC)"
+    info "  Discovery: mDNS (_ruos._udp.local)"
+    info "  Auth: ed25519 node keys"
+    info "  Sync: every 60s, LWW conflict resolution"
+    warn "Federation server binary not yet built — see ADR-SYS-0011"
+}
+
+setup_federation_secondary() {
+    local primary="${1:-}"
+
+    log "Configuring federation secondary..."
+
+    mkdir -p "$HOME/.config/ruos-federation"
+    cat > "$HOME/.config/ruos-federation/cluster.toml" << TOML
+[cluster]
+role = "secondary"
+node_id = "$(hostname)"
+primary_addr = "${primary:-auto}"   # "auto" = discover via mDNS
+
+[sync]
+interval_sec = 60
+pull_only = true         # secondary only pulls, never pushes
+conflict_resolution = "primary-wins"
+
+[auth]
+method = "ed25519"
+TOML
+
+    info "Federation secondary configured"
+    if [ -n "$primary" ]; then
+        info "  Primary: $primary"
+    else
+        info "  Primary: auto-discover via mDNS"
+    fi
+}
+
+# ─── Docker Deployment ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+setup_docker() {
+    log "Generating docker-compose deployment..."
+
+    cat > "$PROJECT_DIR/docker-compose.yml" << 'COMPOSE'
+version: '3.8'
+
+services:
+  brain:
+    image: ubuntu:24.04
+    volumes:
+      - brain-data:/brain-data
+      - ./out/amd64:/usr/local/bin:ro
+    command: /usr/local/bin/mcp-brain-server-local
+    environment:
+      - RUVBRAIN_PORT=9876
+    ports:
+      - "127.0.0.1:9876:9876"
+    restart: unless-stopped
+    mem_limit: 2g
+
+  embedder:
+    image: ubuntu:24.04
+    volumes:
+      - ./out/amd64:/usr/local/bin:ro
+      - embedder-cache:/root/.cache/ruvultra-embedder
+    command: /usr/local/bin/ruvultra-embedder
+    ports:
+      - "127.0.0.1:9877:9877"
+    restart: unless-stopped
+    mem_limit: 2g
+
+  agent:
+    image: python:3.12-slim
+    volumes:
+      - brain-data:/brain-data
+      - ./packages/ruos-agent:/usr/local/bin:ro
+    command: /usr/local/bin/ruos-agent
+    depends_on:
+      - brain
+      - embedder
+    restart: "no"
+
+volumes:
+  brain-data:
+  embedder-cache:
+COMPOSE
+
+    cat > "$PROJECT_DIR/docker-compose.gpu.yml" << 'COMPOSE'
+version: '3.8'
+
+services:
+  brain:
+    extends:
+      file: docker-compose.yml
+      service: brain
+
+  embedder:
+    extends:
+      file: docker-compose.yml
+      service: embedder
+    deploy:
+      resources:
+        reservations:
+          devices:
+            - driver: nvidia
+              count: 1
+              capabilities: [gpu]
+
+  llm:
+    image: python:3.12-slim
+    volumes:
+      - ./packages/ruos-agent:/usr/local/bin:ro
+      - huggingface-cache:/root/.cache/huggingface
+    command: /usr/local/bin/ruos-llm-serve --model Qwen/Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct
+    ports:
+      - "127.0.0.1:8080:8080"
+    deploy:
+      resources:
+        reservations:
+          devices:
+            - driver: nvidia
+              count: 1
+              capabilities: [gpu]
+    restart: unless-stopped
+    mem_limit: 12g
+
+  agent:
+    extends:
+      file: docker-compose.yml
+      service: agent
+    depends_on:
+      - brain
+      - embedder
+      - llm
+
+volumes:
+  brain-data:
+  embedder-cache:
+  huggingface-cache:
+COMPOSE
+
+    info "Generated docker-compose.yml (CPU) and docker-compose.gpu.yml (NVIDIA)"
+    info "  docker compose up -d                              # CPU only"
+    info "  docker compose -f docker-compose.gpu.yml up -d    # with GPU"
+}
+
+# ─── Role Deployment ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+deploy_role() {
+    local role="$1"
+
+    echo ""
+    echo -e "${BOLD}╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗${NC}"
+    echo -e "${BOLD}║  ruOS Bootstrap — ${role}$(printf '%*s' $((34 - ${#role})) '')║${NC}"
+    echo -e "${BOLD}╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝${NC}"
+    echo ""
+
+    case "$role" in
+        workstation)
+            install_core
+            install_brain_service
+            install_embedder cuda
+            install_llm
+            install_agent
+            install_profiles
+            install_desktop
+            install_claude_code
+            $HAS_ESP32 && install_sensor
+            ;;
+        edge)
+            install_core
+            install_brain_service
+            if $HAS_NVIDIA; then
+                install_embedder cuda
+            elif $HAS_INTEL_GPU; then
+                install_embedder intel
+            else
+                install_embedder cpu
+            fi
+            install_agent
+            install_profiles
+            install_claude_code
+            $HAS_ESP32 && install_sensor
+            ;;
+        cluster-primary)
+            install_core
+            install_brain_service
+            if $HAS_NVIDIA; then
+                install_embedder cuda
+                install_llm
+            else
+                install_embedder cpu
+            fi
+            install_agent
+            install_profiles
+            install_claude_code
+            setup_federation_primary
+            $HAS_ESP32 && install_sensor
+            ;;
+        cluster-secondary)
+            install_core
+            install_brain_service
+            install_embedder cpu
+            install_agent
+            setup_federation_secondary "${PRIMARY_ADDR:-}"
+            ;;
+        agent-only)
+            install_core
+            install_agent
+            install_claude_code
+            info "Agent-only: connect to remote brain via RUVBRAIN_URL env var"
+            ;;
+        docker)
+            setup_docker
+            ;;
+        minimal)
+            install_core
+            install_brain_service
+            install_claude_code
+            ;;
+        *)
+            err "Unknown role: $role"
+            exit 1
+            ;;
+    esac
+
+    echo ""
+    log "Bootstrap complete! Role: $role"
+    echo ""
+}
+
+# ─── Status ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+show_status() {
+    echo -e "${BOLD}ruOS Deployment Status${NC}"
+    echo "=" * 50
+
+    detect_hardware
+    print_hardware
+    echo ""
+
+    echo -e "${BOLD}Services${NC}"
+    for svc in ruvultra-brain ruvultra-embedder ruos-llm ruvultra-csi-bridge; do
+        if systemctl --user is-active "$svc" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+            echo -e "  ${GREEN}●${NC} $svc"
+        else
+            echo -e "  ${RED}○${NC} $svc"
+        fi
+    done
+
+    echo ""
+    echo -e "${BOLD}Timers${NC}"
+    for tmr in ruos-agent ruos-agent-nightly ruos-update; do
+        if systemctl --user is-active "$tmr.timer" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+            echo -e "  ${GREEN}●${NC} $tmr.timer"
+        else
+            echo -e "  ${RED}○${NC} $tmr.timer"
+        fi
+    done
+
+    echo ""
+    echo -e "${BOLD}Data${NC}"
+    [ -f "$BRAIN_DIR/brain.sqlite" ] && echo "  Brain: $(sqlite3 "$BRAIN_DIR/brain.sqlite" 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM memories;' 2>/dev/null || echo '?') memories"
+    [ -f "$BRAIN_DIR/brain.rvf" ] && echo "  RVF: $(du -h "$BRAIN_DIR/brain.rvf" | cut -f1)"
+    ls "$BRAIN_DIR/adapters/"*/manifest.json 2>/dev/null | while read m; do
+        echo "  Adapter: $(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('$m')); print(f'{d[\"name\"]} (loss={d[\"loss\"]:.4f})')" 2>/dev/null)"
+    done
+
+    # Federation
+    if [ -f "$HOME/.config/ruos-federation/cluster.toml" ]; then
+        echo ""
+        echo -e "${BOLD}Federation${NC}"
+        grep "role\|primary_addr\|listen_addr" "$HOME/.config/ruos-federation/cluster.toml" | sed 's/^/  /'
+    fi
+}
+
+# ─── Interactive Wizard ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+wizard() {
+    echo -e "${BOLD}"
+    echo "╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗"
+    echo "║                                                      ║"
+    echo "║   ruOS — The First Agentic Operating System          ║"
+    echo "║                                                      ║"
+    echo "║   Bootstrap Wizard                                   ║"
+    echo "║                                                      ║"
+    echo "╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝"
+    echo -e "${NC}"
+
+    detect_hardware
+    print_hardware
+    echo ""
+
+    local recommended=$(recommend_role)
+
+    echo -e "${BOLD}Deployment Roles:${NC}"
+    echo ""
+    echo "  1) workstation        Full stack: brain + CUDA embedder + Qwen2.5-3B LLM"
+    echo "                        + agent + desktop + Claude Code + sensors"
+    echo ""
+    echo "  2) edge               Brain + embedder + agent (no LLM, no desktop)"
+    echo "                        For Pi 5, Jetson, Intel NUC"
+    echo ""
+    echo "  3) cluster-primary    Full stack + federation server (QUIC brain sync)"
+    echo "                        Other nodes sync brain data from this node"
+    echo ""
+    echo "  4) cluster-secondary  Brain + agent, pulls from primary via QUIC"
+    echo "                        Auto-discovers primary via mDNS"
+    echo ""
+    echo "  5) agent-only         Agent + MCP tools, connects to remote brain"
+    echo "                        Lightweight — no local brain or embedder"
+    echo ""
+    echo "  6) docker             Generate docker-compose files (CPU + GPU)"
+    echo ""
+    echo "  7) minimal            Brain + MCP tools only (no agent, no LLM)"
+    echo ""
+
+    echo -e "  Recommended for this hardware: ${GREEN}${recommended}${NC}"
+    echo ""
+    read -p "  Select role [1-7, or name] (default: $recommended): " choice
+
+    case "${choice:-$recommended}" in
+        1|workstation)      deploy_role workstation ;;
+        2|edge)             deploy_role edge ;;
+        3|cluster-primary)  deploy_role cluster-primary ;;
+        4|cluster-secondary)
+            read -p "  Primary node address (or 'auto' for mDNS): " PRIMARY_ADDR
+            export PRIMARY_ADDR
+            deploy_role cluster-secondary
+            ;;
+        5|agent-only)       deploy_role agent-only ;;
+        6|docker)           deploy_role docker ;;
+        7|minimal)          deploy_role minimal ;;
+        *)                  deploy_role "${choice:-$recommended}" ;;
+    esac
+}
+
+# ─── Main ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+main() {
+    local role=""
+    local primary_addr=""
+
+    while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
+        case "$1" in
+            --role)     role="$2"; shift 2 ;;
+            --primary)  primary_addr="$2"; shift 2 ;;
+            --status)   detect_hardware; show_status; exit 0 ;;
+            --help|-h)
+                echo "Usage: ruos-bootstrap [--role ROLE] [--primary ADDR] [--status]"
+                echo "Roles: workstation, edge, cluster-primary, cluster-secondary, agent-only, docker, minimal"
+                exit 0
+                ;;
+            *)          shift ;;
+        esac
+    done
+
+    detect_hardware
+
+    if [ -n "$role" ]; then
+        [ -n "$primary_addr" ] && export PRIMARY_ADDR="$primary_addr"
+        deploy_role "$role"
+    else
+        wizard
+    fi
+}
+
+main "$@"
